Bitcoin ETF inflows resume; July 10 saw $90.4M net inflow –
Link
After Thursday's $95.3 million outflow, Bitcoin spot ETFs posted a $90.4 million net inflow on July 10. BlackRock's IBIT led with $86.8 million, while Ethereum ETFs saw $18.4 million of inflows.
Matters because:
The reversal suggests renewed institutional demand and may help support price stability above $63,000.

Daily news snapshot: Altcoins watchlist
1. Arbitrum (ARB): +20%
• Market cap: ≈$3.5 billion
• ARB surged about 20% on July 10 after Robinhood Chain launched using Arbitrum as its underlying technology provider.
Catalysts:
• Robinhood Chain will allocate 10% of its protocol net revenue back to the Arbitrum ecosystem.
• The move highlights ecosystem expansion and revenue-sharing mechanics.
• Current activity remains primarily meme-coin driven.
Matters because:
The Robinhood Chain tie-in gives Arbitrum a clear ecosystem catalyst, though the current usage mix is still largely speculative.
2. Cash Cat (CASHCAT): +40% intraday
• Market cap: $180 million
• The meme coin briefly hit an all-time high market cap of $180 million.
Catalysts:
• Robinhood Chain's explosive first week with $1 billion+ in DEX volume.
Matters because:
It shows how quickly speculative meme-coin activity can accelerate on a new chain, but the move lacks fundamental backing.
3. Solana (SOL): ETF inflow of $150,500
• Market cap: ≈$70 billion
• Solana spot ETF (TSOL) recorded a net inflow of $150,500 on July 10, with total SOL spot ETF assets at $901 million.
Matters because:
Even a modest inflow points to continued institutional interest in Solana despite broader caution.

Reserve launches five AI supply chain token funds on BNB Chain –
Link
Reserve Protocol launched five decentralized token funds tracking the AI infrastructure supply chain on BNB Chain.
• $BUILDOUT — overall AI stack
• $POWER — energy
• $PHOTON — photonics
• $NEOCLOUD — compute capacity
• $ROBOTS — robotics
Each fund is built from tokenized US-listed companies and trades 24/7.
Matters because:
It expands on-chain access to AI infrastructure exposure through tokenized products.

Culturally Crypto, Practically TradFi
> Robinhood is using crypto to vertically integrate brokerage, tokenized stocks, perps, lending, and settlement through its own chain, leveraging its 28M users who are culturally aligned with crypto but remain in TradFi.
> The chain combines RWAs for utility and now memes for engagement, with a future stablecoin potentially becoming the final layer, capturing float revenue, improving margins, and giving Robinhood control over the full financial stack.
Source:
https://x.com/Decentralisedco/status/2075587828176867709

SWIFT launches blockchain ledger for tokenized deposit pilot with 17 banks –
Link
SWIFT announced a blockchain ledger initiative and a pilot for tokenized deposits with 17 global banks. The ledger will enable participating banks to support 24/7 cross-border payments, including overnight and weekend transactions, while maintaining existing compliance, credit, risk and control standards embedded in current payment processing.
Matters because:
It signals deeper institutional adoption of blockchain infrastructure for traditional finance settlement.

Backpack Launches First 24/7 Market for Real U.S. Equities
> International investors can now buy and sell real U.S. equities on Backpack 24/7/365.
> SpaceX (SPCX), Micron (MU), and SanDisk (SNDK) are among the first equities available.
Source:
https://learn.backpack.exchange/blog/backpack-launches-24-7-trading-real-us-equities

Long-term holder capitulation signals potential market bottom –
Link
Bitcoin long-term holder capitulation reached $280M per day, the highest level since December 2022. Analysts are reading it as a later-stage bottoming signal.
Matters because:
Capitulation may be nearing completion, which could set up a recovery if selling pressure continues to fade.

tweet.text: THE BLOCK: Bitcoin's long-term holder capitulation hit $280M/day, the highest since Dec 2022 and a signal analysts say marks the later stages of a bottoming process.

Horizontal to Vertical: A New Strategy Shift at Early-Stage
> The wrapper generation is dead. AI startups are shifting from horizontal “AI wrappers”(companies that built single-task tools on top of foundation models) to verticalized companies that own entire workflows (owning every piece of the value chain).
> Vertical thinking is a way to stay a step ahead of the frontier labs and potentially pervasive AGI.
👇
Source:

Introducing NEO’s 25 Degrees of Freedom, tendon-driven hands — nearing or surpassing human-level dexterity, strength, speed, and reliability.

For seventy years, robotics worked around the hand problem. The humanoid bet is the reverse: it lives or dies at the fingertips.

recent_posts.text:
Fed officials signal potential rate hikes by September if inflation persists –
Link
Federal Reserve meeting minutes released July 8 show 9 of 18 participants now project at least one rate hike by December 2026, up from zero in March. The Fed also flagged AI infrastructure investment as a new inflation driver, alongside Middle East tensions and tariffs.
Matters because:
A more hawkish Fed could keep risk appetite under pressure for crypto assets.
